title: Reign Of Eternal
description: This is a modpack in the RTS genre, significantly changing and improving the Reign Of Nether mod
body:
Welcome to Reign Of Eternal — the ultimate and arguably the best RTS modpack based on Reign Of Nether, designed specifically for epic battles with friends. Unlike many abandoned projects, we run on the absolute latest version of the mod, fully optimized and battle-ready.

The core of Reign Of Eternal is a total balance overhaul. We’ve patched the "holes" of the original mod and eliminated cheap "ultra-fast" tactics (no more winning by rushing a Beacon in the first 10 minutes). The gameplay is now more tactical, paced, and fair.

Why this is the best pack in its genre:

* No More Heavy Unit Spam: We’ve introduced strict unit caps for "heavy" units (Wardens, Maradeurs, Golems, Vindicators). Strategy now beats mindless mass-clicking.
* Anti-Blitzkrieg Meta: Costs for key buildings and units have been rebalanced to give players time to develop and engage in meaningful, long-term warfare.
* Plug & Play: The pack comes with a massive pre-installed map pack. Just download and start the war — no need to hunt for maps separately.
* Unique Heroes: A feature from the latest updates! Each faction has 2 unique heroes with powerful abilities, but you can only choose one per match.

Choose Your Side (Quick Guide):

* 🏰 Villagers: The perfect start for newcomers. A blend of villager ingenuity and Illager militarism. Their hero, The Enchanter, buffs your entire army and workers with unique enchantments and powerful auras.
* 💀 Monsters: Legions of undead and spiders. They are vulnerable during the day but become a true nightmare at night. They rely on the "Darkness" mechanic, spreading their influence through structures. Their hero, the Wretched Wraith, freezes enemies with blizzards, slowing them down and shredding their armor.
* 🔥 Piglins: Invaders from the Nether. They expand through portals (now perfectly balanced!) and terraform the Overworld into a hellish landscape. Their hero, The Wildfire, incinerates single targets and floods the battlefield with soulfire and magma.
